  • Rated 4 out of 5 stars

    Roku 32” tv

    Brooks Posted 2 weeks ago

    Works great, and exactly as described on the website - size, dimensions, features. The speakers are underneath the TV, which makes it a little hard to hear on a low volume setting. It’s an LED, not an OLED, the picture is reflective of that, but still good. For the price and what you’re getting it was exactly as described.

    I would recommend this to a friend
